prompt: Prototype a signup flow in code so the team can click through it.
load_bearing: The maturity-label invariant — a coded artifact must be labeled disposable / design-reference / production-candidate and must not be presented as production-ready without review.

prompt: Build a dark-mode OKLCH palette and check the contrast.
load_bearing: Exact OKLCH values plus contrast-floor verification rather than adjective-level color guidance.

prompt: Create an accessible iOS onboarding prototype.
load_bearing: Bundle routing recall — prototyping + surface-ios + accessibility are read while surface-android is not.
The visual-verdict safety rule (rendered evidence required, else 'code-level pass, not an art review') plus Before/After/Why and a binary verdict.
